purpose: Define the one-time temporary-link pass used to bring an existing independent service into v0.6 governance shape without creating central runtime ownership.

required_phases.outcome: the service can emit reviewable receipts in the central format

hard_rules: Normalization may use a temporary link but must not leave a persistent central runtime dependency.
Normalization must improve service governance shape without forcing service-local implementation folders into a fixed app layout.
Normalization is incomplete until a normalization receipt exists.
Normalization must confirm the fixed DTP paths are present under governance/dtp before normalized status is granted.
Normalization must treat renamed substitutes for required kernel paths as non-compliant.
